description: Contract that defines what constitutes a valid, coherent package story
purpose: Use package story validation to identify false narratives, then fix them to enable accurate SDK grouping

responsibility_quality.description: Each file responsibility must be a real, human-readable description of purpose

rules.name: no_linting_noise
rules.description: Responsibilities must not be linting directives

rules.name: prose_required
rules.description: Responsibility must contain a verb and explain WHAT the file does

semantic_cohesion.description: A package should have consistent role, domain, and purpose across its files

rules.name: dominant_role
rules.description: One role should account for >70% of files

rules.name: single_domain
rules.description: Package should represent a single business/technical domain

rules.name: consistent_actor
rules.description: Files should have same owning actor/team

story_validity.description: A package story must be clear and internally consistent

rules.name: name_story_alignment
rules.description: Package name must align with story
examples: ✗ code-intelligence-persistence-stores → 'projection compiler for code analysis' (name says stores, story says compiler)

rules.name: non_contradictory_roles
rules.description: Dominant role must match package purpose

step_1_identify_false_narratives.description: Flag files/packages with unclear or contradictory responsibilities

step_2_fix_responsibilities.description: Run worker-bee file-layer revalidate pass to improve unclear responsibilities

step_3_revalidate_stories.description: Re-run package story analyzer to extract true narratives

step_4_verify_contract_compliance.description: Check updated stories against this contract

step_5_group_into_sdks.description: Once stories are validated, group packages by semantic cohesion

sdk_grouping_strategy.description: After validation, group packages into SDKs based on validated stories
criteria: Shared business domain (e.g., all governance-related packages)
Shared technical layer (e.g., all persistence-stores packages)
Dependency relationships (packages that import each other)

value_chain: Clear package stories → understand what system does
Gap analysis → understand what's missing or needs refactoring
